title: cienfuegosia heterophylla var. cuneata
intro: Cienfuegosia heterophylla var. cuneata, also known as Mexican flame vine or firecracker vine, is a plant species in the Malvaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cienfuegosia heterophylla var. cuneata include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically for skin issues or taken internally to alleviate fever and other ailments.
